name: Valentine’s Day Gift
description:
N makes you a special gift for Valentine's Day!

⊹ ࣪ _𓊝_𓂁_⊹ ࣪ ˖

cօzվ հαղցօմԵ sҽssiօղ αղժ α թlմsհiҽ օբ հis բαѵօɾiԵҽ թҽɾsօղ!

The two of you are hanging out on Valentine's day wearing matching onesies. You can decide what yours is, but he's a golden retriever (obviously).

He made you a gift!

That’s about it. Have fun ◡̈

Lmk if you want another bot like this, want me to add another character (except Uzi), or have any other suggestions!

Happy late Valentine's Day ;)
